englishDefinitions: Active, out of bed, and moving around, especially after being ill or inactive.
persianTranslation: سر پا و در حال جنب‌وجوش بودن
از بستر بیرون آمدن و مشغول بودن
examples: She's finally up and about around after the surgery.
By noon, he was up and about around the house again.
The doctor said it would take a few days before I was up and about around.
